_meta.description: Level S to Level 0/1/2 account mapping for financial statements
notes: computation: how the Level S value is derived
operator: + means add, - means subtract from Level 0 accounts to arrive at Level S
sign_convention: Level 0 IS uses positive=expense, positive=income (revenue is negative). Level S uses positive=inflow, negative=outflow (management view).
ignore_now: rows marked ignore_now are in Level S but computation deferred (VAT from rebate lines)
calculated: row is computed from other Level S rows, no direct Level 0 mapping

Revenue.sign_note: Level 0 Sales is negative (credit), Level S shows positive. Flip sign.
Revenue.remarks: Direct 1:1 mapping to Sales account only. Others revenue is separate.

Others revenue.sign_note: All income accounts are negative in Level 0. Flip sign for Level S positive display.

level_0_accounts.ac_name: Received Against Operating & Sales Distribution from Sister Concern
Disable Payroll ID Reconciliation with additional Salary

Others revenue.level_1_rollup: Multiple: 00801-Income, 0801-International Purchase Income, 0802-Discount Received, 0802-Income, 0802-Sales Distribution Received, 0803-Others Received, 0804-Others Income, 0805-Others Income 2
Others revenue.remarks: Sum of ALL revenue accounts except main Sales (08010001).

MRP Discount.remarks: Currently zero across all years. Marked 'Should be less from expenses' in Level S. When non-zero, subtract from revenue side.

Adjusted Revenue.remarks: Calculated Level S row. Marked 'Ignore this for now'. No direct Level 0 mapping.

COGS.sign_note: Level 0 COGS accounts are positive (debit). Level S shows negative. Flip sign.
COGS.remarks: Core COGS. Excludes 0501-OTHERS DIRECT EXPENSES (05010001 = Product Refurbishment is included; other 0501 items are minor). Note: 04010004 Store Redemption carries into COGS per Level 0 grouping.

Gross Profit.remarks: Calculated from Revenue minus COGS. (Note: Level S remark says 'Adjs Rev - COGS' but Adjusted Revenue is ignored for now, so use Revenue - COGS).

SG&A.sign_note: Expenses are positive in Level 0. Level S shows negative.

level_0_accounts.ac_name: RH Home Center Shop-125 Utility & Service Charge
R H Home Center Shop-125 General Exp.
Mirer Bazar Head Quarter Holding Tax
Gift For Others Organization & Variety Ceremony

SG&A.level_1_rollup: 0601-Office Expenses + 0602-Other Office Expenses + 0603-License & Certification Expenses + 0604-City Corporation Tax + 0606-Administrative Car Expenses + 0607-Other Entertainment Expenses + 0610-Mortgage Registration Fee + 0616-Misacellaneous Expenses + 0617-Conveyance + 0618-Printing & Stationary Expenses + 0619-Computer & Software Expenses + 0621-Entertainment + 0622-Repairs & Maintenance + 0623-Rent + 0624-Travelling Expenses + 0625-Other Property Taxes + 0626-Utility Expenses + 0627-Office & Administrative Phone Bill + 0628-Internet Expenses + 0631-Other Expenses + 0632-Medical Expenses + 0634-Uniform Expenses + 0636-Depreciation + 0637-General Insurance + 0638-Recruitment Expenses + 0639-Provident Fund Expenses + 0440-Consultant Expenditure
SG&A.level_2_rollup: 06-Office & Administrative Expenses (partial — excludes 0612/0613/0614/0615 salary items and interest/tax codes)
SG&A.remarks: SG&A = all 06xx admin expenses EXCEPT salary (06120001), bonus (06130001/2), overtime (06140001), director remuneration (06150001-3), bank interest (06300001-3), VAT expenses (06290001-2), income tax (06290002), and internal loan interest (06330001, 06350001-2). Those are broken out separately.

Total SG&A.remarks: Calculated sum of all SGA lines. No direct Level 0 mapping — derived from component rows.

0708-Discount Paid.remarks: Only the cash discount account. MRP Discount (07080002) is a separate Level S line.

level_0_accounts.ac_name: Digital SMS System & Others Subscription Fee
Sales Commission for slow item & other package

Sales & Distribution Expenses.level_1_rollup: 0701-Advertisement + 0702-Packeging Expenses + 0703-Vehicle Expenses + 0704-Other Commisions + 0705-Daily Allowance + 0706-Transportation + 0709-Bad Debt + 0710-Marketing Phone Bill + 0711-Awards & Commisions + 0712-Conveyance + 0713-Miscellaneous + 0714-Marketing TA & DA + 0501-OTHERS DIRECT EXPENSES (partial)
Sales & Distribution Expenses.remarks: Excludes 07080001 (Discount Paid) which is its own Level S line. Includes 05010001 Product Refurbishment per numerical reconciliation with Level S values.

Total Sales & Distribution Expenses.remarks: Sum of Discount Paid and all other S&D expenses.

0501-Others Direct Expenses.sign_note: These accounts carry mixed signs in Level 0. Use values as-is.
0501-Others Direct Expenses.remarks: The Level S '0501-Others Direct Expenses' line matches the Level 1 '0501-OTHERS DIRECT EXPENSES' value. This captures store redemptions and minor direct cost items that do not fall cleanly into COGS or S&D.

EBITDA.remarks: Calculated: Gross Profit minus Total SG&A minus Total S&D. Level S remark: 'Calculate GROSS Profit - Total SG&A - Total Sales & Distribution'.

0630-Bank Interest & Charges.remarks: Bank-side interest: OD interest, bank charges, and loan interest from MD Sir.

0633-Interest-Loan.remarks: Term loan and internal loan interest. Separate from bank OD interest in 0630.

Total interest & Charges.remarks: Sum of both interest lines. Maps to Level 1 '0630- Bank Interest & Charges' + '0633-Interest-Loan', Level 2 '06A-Interest Expenses'.

VAT Expenses from rebate(A).remarks: Marked 'Ignore this line for now — Will be calculated from A Specific account ledger'. No mapping defined yet.

VAT through cash(i).remarks: Marked 'Ignore this line for now'. No mapping defined yet.

Others Company Tax (GI, Zepto, Packaging.level_s_row: Others Company Tax ( GI, Zepto , Packaging)(ii)
Others Company Tax (GI, Zepto, Packaging.remarks: Marked 'Ignore this line for now'. No mapping defined yet.

Vat Expenses (Office Expenses)(iii).remarks: Marked 'Ignore this line for now'. No mapping defined yet.

Net Vat Expenses (Cash) (B).sign_note: Level 0 ac_code 06290001 VAT Expenses is positive (expense). Level S shows negative.
Net Vat Expenses (Cash) (B).level_1_rollup: 0629- HMBR VAT & Tax Expenses (partial — VAT portion only)
Net Vat Expenses (Cash) (B).remarks: Currently mapped to ac_code 06290001 only. The three sub-lines (i, ii, iii) that feed this are deferred. When those are implemented, this line becomes their computed sum.

0629-Income Tax Expenses (c).level_1_rollup: 0629- HMBR VAT & Tax Expenses (partial — income tax only)

0629-VAT & Tax Expenses (A+B+C).remarks: Total tax line = VAT (06290001) + Income Tax (06290002). Maps directly to Level 1 '0629- HMBR VAT & Tax Expenses' and Level 2 '06B-Taxes & Duties Expenses'. When VAT from rebate lines are implemented, VAT portion (A) will be added here.

Net Income.remarks: Calculated: EBITDA minus Total Interest minus Total Tax. Equivalent to Net Profit/Loss in Level 0/1/2 (sign-flipped — Level 0 NP is positive for loss, Level S shows loss as negative).

0101-Cash & Cash Equivalent.remarks: Cash equivalents only (general cash + petty items). Bank balance is separate row.

Accounts Receivable (Local).remarks: Specifically future collection receivables broken out separately in Level S.

Recognized Agent (dealers).remarks: Dealer/agent receivables broken out in Level S.

0103-Accounts Receivable (Total).remarks: Sum of three AR sub-lines. Matches Level 1 '0103-ACCOUNTS RECEIVABLE'.

0104-Prepaid Expenses.remarks: Primarily advanced salary. Level 0 01040001 warehouse advance is zero.

0105-Advance Accounts.remarks: All advance accounts. Matches Level 1 '0105-ADVANCE ACCOUNTS'.

01-Total CURRENT ASSET (A).remarks: Sum of all current asset rows. Matches Level 1 '01-CURRENT ASSET (A)' / Level 2 '01-CURRENT ASSET'.

level_0_accounts.ac_name: Loan to HMBR Paint Roller Co.
Loan to HMBR Steel Scrubber Co.
Loan to FIX iT HMBR Ltd.
Loan to GI For Property Share

0301-Office Equipment.remarks: Sum of all 03010xxx ac_codes. See Level 1 for full list.

0903-Accounts Payable (Total).remarks: Sum of the three AP sub-lines. Matches Level 1 '0903-Accounts Payable' total.

0903-total Accounts Payable.remarks: Extended AP total including accruals and agent liabilities.

Current liability (A).remarks: Wait — per Level S layout, Current Liability A = 0903 total + 1001(1). Cross-check with Level 1 '09-Current Liability' which = 0901+0903+0904+0905+0906 total.

level_0_accounts.ac_name: Loan Against Trust Received From UCB (LTR)

1001-Short Term Bank Loan (1) (B).remarks: Bank OD and institutional short-term loans.

level_0_accounts.ac_name: Loan From  Md Sir For Manufacturing Project

1001-Short Term Bank Loan.remarks: Loans from related entities and individuals (non-bank).

1002-Short Term Loan.remarks: Note: Level 0 10020016 + other non-bank loans map to both 1001 and 1002 in Level S. Cross-check with Level 1 '1002-Short Term Loan' which uses 10020016 series.

1301A-Non-Cash Capital (Retained Earning.remarks: Combined retained earnings and P&L appropriation.

level_0_accounts.ac_name: Reconciliation of the balance sheet to match owner's equity

Net Profit/Loss (BS).remarks: Injected from Net Income calculation in Income Statement. Same value, sign-flipped for BS (loss is positive asset-side, negative equity-side).

Balance Check.remarks: Should be zero (or near-zero). Non-zero indicates unreconciled items in the source data.

Cash Flow Statement._note: The CFS is entirely derived from the IS and BS. Level S CFS rows map directly to Level 0 account movement (delta) values, not balance values. All CFS entries in Level 0 sheet represent year-on-year changes.

Net Profit/Loss.remarks: Taken directly from IS Net Income.

Depreciation.remarks: Non-cash add-back. Currently zero in recent years.

Working Capital items.mapping_rule: Each WC line in Level S CFS = (current year BS balance - prior year BS balance) for that account group. The accounts are identical to those in the Balance Sheet section above for current assets (0103-0106) and current liabilities (0901-0906).
Working Capital items.remarks: The CFS WC section in Level S mirrors Level 0 CFS exactly. Use same ac_code groups as BS current asset/liability sections.

CapEx items.mapping_rule: Each CapEx line = (current year BS balance - prior year BS balance) for fixed/other asset accounts.
CapEx items.remarks: Same ac_code groups as BS Other Asset and Fixed Asset sections.

Financing items.level_s_row: Individual Financing lines (0904 Money Agent, 1001, 1002, 1101-1104, 1301 series)
Financing items.mapping_rule: Each Financing line = (current year BS balance - prior year BS balance) for liability and equity accounts.
Financing items.remarks: Same ac_code groups as BS liability and equity sections.

Opening Cash & CE.remarks: Prior year closing (0101 + 0102) becomes current year opening.

Closing Cash & CE.remarks: Actual closing = current year (0101 + 0102) from Balance Sheet.

Cash-flow Check.remarks: Difference between calculated and actual closing cash. Should be near-zero.
